Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class ContractTypeConfig

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.ContractTypeConfig
public class ContractTypeConfig extends Object

Java class for ContractTypeConfig complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="ContractTypeConfig">
   <complexContent>
     <restriction base="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}anyType">
       <sequence>
         <element name="configType" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}ContractConfigType"/>
         <element name="configValue" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="usageType" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}ContractUsageType" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </restriction>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
